(ubi <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑψόπρ-</foreign> codd.); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑψίπρῳρον αἶρε ταρσόν</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
